archimate:DataObject.name: Survey Form
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: The Survey Form is designed for conducting detailed surveys or polls. It can encompass a variety of question types, including multiple-choice, Likert scales, and open-ended responses. This form is used to gather data on customer preferences, market trends, or public opinions, providing valuable insights that can guide business strategies, marketing efforts, and product development.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: SV-Forms Structure
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SurveyFormDataObject
ABB name: egovera:SurveyFormDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/SurveyFormDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FormsStructureDataObject

properties.value: The Survey Form is designed for conducting detailed surveys or polls. It can encompass a variety of question types, including multiple-choice, Likert scales, and open-ended responses. This form is used to gather data on customer preferences, market trends, or public opinions, providing valuable insights that can guide business strategies, marketing efforts, and product development.
